[[File:Chunker_Bruiser.png|thumb|right|200px|A Chunker bruiser.]]
The '''Chunkers''' were a gang of [[Scavenger/Legends|junk]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]]<ref name="SWG" /> active on the [[Double Worlds|Twin]] [[Planet/Legends|World]] of [[Talus/Legends|Talus]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="SWG" /> They primarily stole items that other people had trashed or "chunked away"—hence their name. They would acquire weapons and equipment solely by looking through abandoned camps and junk piles.<ref name="CDAG" /> They operated a [[Chunker Bunker|bunker]] on Talus, which they used as their base.<ref name="SWG" />
